items.summary: The Royals lost to the Houston Astros, KC 7, HOU 8. Lane Thomas led the night, 1-3 | HR, BB, K in the latest Royals game. Carter Jensen supplied the loudest Royals contact at 106.2 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Astros Recap
